channel.title: Google News - AAPL
channel.description: Google News search results for AAPL

item.title: Apple Stock Hits All-Time High After Strong Earnings Beat
item.description: Apple Inc. shares surged to a new all-time high after the company reported quarterly earnings that significantly exceeded analyst expectations.

item.title: Apple Vision Pro Sales Disappoint in First Quarter
item.description: Apple's mixed-reality headset sold fewer units than expected in its debut quarter, analysts say.
